if.test: (lstComActvDateF != null and lstComActvDateF != '' and lstComActvDateT != null and lstComActvDateT != '') or (searchGbn != null and searchGbn != '' and searchName != null and searchName != '')

mapper.select:
/* OpenMgmtMapper.getOpenMgmtListDtl */ WITH TT AS ( SELECT SUB.CONTRACT_NUM , SUB.SVC_CNTR_NO , SUB.SUBSCRIBER_NO , SUB.CUSTOMER_ID , SUB.BAN , SUB.SUB_LINK_NAME , SUB.USER_SSN AS SSN , SUB.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE AS OPEN_DT , DECODE ( SUB.SUB_STATUS,'C' , SUBSTR ( SUB.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1 , 8),'' ) AS TMNT_DT , DECODE ( SUB.SUB_STATUS,'C' , FN_GET_CODENM ('RCP0060' , FN_GET_CANRSN ( SUB.CONTRACT_NUM))) AS CAN_RSN , SUB.ICC_ID , SUB.OPEN_AGNT_CD , SUB.SUB_STATUS , SUB.REAL_USE_CUST_NO , BAN.BAN_ADR_PRIMARY_LN || ' ' || BAN.BAN_ADR_SECONDARY_LN AS CUSTOMER_ADR , SUB.UNPD_IND_CD , REQ.RES_NO , REQ.REQUEST_KEY , REQ.OPER_TYPE , REQ.CSTMR_TYPE , REQ.REQ_BUY_TYPE , REQ.APP_CD , REQ.ON_OFF_TYPE , REQ.OPEN_MARKET_REFERER , TO_CHAR(REQ.REQ_IN_DAY, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS REQ_IN_DAY , NVL(REQ.REC_YN, 'N') AS REC_YN , NVL(REQ.SHOP_CD, (SELECT CNTPNT_CD FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO A WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.EVNT_TRTM_DT = (SELECT MIN(EVNT_TRTM_DT) FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM) AND ROWNUM = 1) ) AS SHOP_CD /*판매점코드*/ , CASE WHEN REQ.SHOP_CD IS NULL THEN (SELECT CNTPNT_CD FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO A WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.EVNT_TRTM_DT = (SELECT MIN(EVNT_TRTM_DT) FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM) AND ROWNUM = 1) || '/' || (SELECT B.ORGN_NM FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO A , ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.CNTPNT_CD = B.ORGN_ID AND A.EVNT_TRTM_DT = (SELECT MIN(EVNT_TRTM_DT) FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM) AND ROWNUM = 1) ELSE FN_GET_ORGNM(REQ.SHOP_CD) || '/' || REQ.SHOP_CD END AS SHOP_NM /*판매점*/ , REQ.SHOP_USM_ID , REQ.REQ_USIM_NAME , MOV.MOVE_COMPANY , AGT.MINOR_AGENT_NAME , AGT.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN || AGT.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN || AGT.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN AS MINOR_AGENT_TEL , AGT.MINOR_AGENT_RELATION , SALE.MODEL_DISCOUNT3 , SALE.USIM_PAY_MTHD_CD , SALE.JOIN_PAY_MTHD_CD , NVL(SALE.JOIN_PRICE, 0) AS JOIN_PRICE , NVL(SALE.USIM_PRICE, 0) AS USIM_PRICE , REQ.SCAN_ID , FN_GET_SALECD(SUB.CONTRACT_NUM , SALE.MODEL_SALE_POLICY_CODE) AS SALE_PLCY_CD , ( SELECT SALE_PLCY_NM FROM MSP_SALE_PLCY_MST WHERE SALE_PLCY_CD = FN_GET_SALECD (SUB.CONTRACT_NUM , SALE.MODEL_SALE_POLICY_CODE) ) AS SALE_PLCY_NM , ( SELECT RPAD( A.MODEL_ID, 20, ' ' ) || RPAD(A.MODEL_NM, 30, ' ') || RPAD( A.INTM_SRL_NO, 30, ' ' ) FROM MSP_JUO_MODEL_INFO A WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.MODEL_TYPE = 'D1' AND A.MODEL_ID NOT IN ( SELECT PRDT_ID FROM CMN_INTM_MDL WHERE PRDT_TYPE_CD = '02' ) AND A.EVNT_TRTM_DT = ( SELECT MIN(EVNT_TRTM_DT) FROM MSP_JUO_MODEL_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND MODEL_TYPE = 'D1' ) AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS FST_MODEL_INFO , ( SELECT RPAD( A.MODEL_ID, 20, ' ' ) || RPAD(A.MODEL_NM, 30, ' ') || RPAD( A.INTM_SRL_NO, 30, ' ' ) FROM MSP_JUO_MODEL_INFO A WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.MODEL_TYPE = 'D1' AND A.EVNT_TRTM_DT = ( SELECT MAX(EVNT_TRTM_DT) FROM MSP_JUO_MODEL_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND MODEL_TYPE = 'D1' ) AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS LST_MODEL_INFO , ( SELECT RPAD(A.SOC, 10, ' ') || RPAD(B.DATA_TYPE, 10 , ' ') || B.RATE_NM FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO A , MSP_RATE_MST B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND A.EVNT_TRTM_DT = ( SELECT MIN(EVNT_TRTM_DT) FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' ) AND A.SOC = B.RATE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS FST_SOC_INFO , ( SELECT RPAD(A.SOC, 10, ' ') || RPAD(B.DATA_TYPE, 10 , ' ') || B.RATE_NM FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO A , MSP_RATE_MST B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND A.EVNT_TRTM_DT = ( SELECT MAX(EVNT_TRTM_DT) FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' ) AND A.SOC = B.RATE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS LST_SOC_INFO , ( SELECT NVL(A.BL_DC_TYPE, ' ') || LPAD(NVL(A.DVC_OFW_AMNT, 0), 10 , '0') || LPAD(NVL(A.INST_ORGIN_AMNT, 0 ), 10 , '0') || LPAD(NVL(A.INST_MNTH_CNT, 0), 3 , '0') || LPAD(NVL(A.ENGG_MNTH_CNT, 0), 3 , '0') || RPAD(DECODE(A.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO, 'none', '', A.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO), 14, ' ') || A.GRNT_INSR_STAT_CD FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO A WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.EVNT_TRTM_DT = ( SELECT MIN(EVNT_TRTM_DT) FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM CMN_INTM_MDL WHERE RPRS_PRDT_ID = A.MODEL_ID AND PRDT_TYPE_CD = '02' ) AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS INST_INFO , ( SELECT 'SM' || LPAD(A.ENGG_MNTH_CNT, 3 , '0') || RPAD(A.SIM_ID, 14 , ' ') || SUBSTR(A.SIM_START_DT, 1 , 8) || SUBSTR(A.SIM_END_DT, 1 , 8) || A.GRNT_INSR_STAT_CD FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO A WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.SIM_ID IS NOT NULL AND A.EVNT_TRTM_DT = ( SELECT MAX(EVNT_TRTM_DT) FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND SIM_ID IS NOT NULL ) AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS SIM_INFO , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP9011', CST.RECOMMEND_FLAG_CD) AS RECOMMEND_FLAG_NM /* 추천인구분명 */ , CST.RECOMMEND_INFO AS RECOMMEND_INFO /* 추천인정보 */ , REQ.PROD_TYPE , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP0063', NVL(REQ.PROD_TYPE, '01')) AS PROD_TYPE_NM , SALE.RENTAL_BASE_AMT , SALE.RENTAL_BASE_DC_AMT , SALE.RENTAL_MODEL_CP_AMT , ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM MSP_DVC_CHG_AGNT_HST A , MSP_REQUEST B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM AND ( A.APPL_END_DTTM = '99991231000000' OR TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.APPL_END_DTTM, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.APPL_STRT_DTTM, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') > 14 ) AND A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND B.OPER_TYPE(+) IN ('HCN3', 'HDN3') ) AS DVC_CHG_CNT , SUB.TRNS_YN
FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SUB , MSP_REQUEST REQ , MSP_REQUEST_SALEINFO SALE , MSP_REQUEST_MOVE MOV , MSP_REQUEST_AGENT AGT , MSP_REQUEST_CSTMR CST , MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO BAN WHERE SUB.PPPO = 'PO' AND SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = REQ.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND REQ.OPER_TYPE(+) IN ( 'NAC3', 'MNP3') AND REQ.REQUEST_KEY = SALE.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND REQ.REQUEST_KEY = MOV.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND REQ.REQUEST_KEY = AGT.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND REQ.REQUEST_KEY = CST.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = #{CONTRACT_NUM} AND SUB.BAN = BAN.BAN ) SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM AS contractNum /*가입계약번호 */ , A.SVC_CNTR_NO AS svcCntrNo /*서비스계약번호*/ , A.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS subscriberNo /*휴대폰번호 */ , A.OPEN_DT AS openDt /*개통일자 */ , A.TMNT_DT AS tmntDt /*해지일자 */ , A.CAN_RSN AS canRsn /*해지사유 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('MSP0003', A.SUB_STATUS) AS subStatusNm /*계약상태 */ , TRIM(SUBSTR(A.LST_SOC_INFO, 11 , 10)) AS lstDataType /*고객구분 */ , SUBSTR(A.LST_SOC_INFO, 21 ) AS lstRateNm /*요금제 */ , TRIM(SUBSTR(A.LST_MODEL_INFO, 21 , 30)) AS lstModelNm /*단말모델명 */ , TRIM(SUBSTR(A.LST_MODEL_INFO, 51 , 30)) AS lstModelSrlNum /*단말일련번호 */ , A.ICC_ID AS iccId /*USIM일련번호 */ , TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(A.INST_INFO, 26, 3)) AS enggMnthCnt /*약정개월수 */ , TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(A.INST_INFO, 23, 3)) AS instMnthCnt /*할부개월수 */ , TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(A.INST_INFO, 13, 10)) AS instOrginAmnt /*할부원금 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP0048', A.JOIN_PAY_MTHD_CD) AS joinPayMthdNm /*가입비납부방법*/ , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP0056', A.USIM_PAY_MTHD_CD) AS usimPayMthdNm /*USIM납부방법 */ , A.USIM_PRICE AS usimPrice /*USIM판매가 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('MSP0007', A.UNPD_IND_CD) AS unpdIndNm /*미납상태 */ , A.BAN AS ban /*청구계정ID */ , A.CUSTOMER_ID AS customerId /*고객ID */ , A.SUB_LINK_NAME AS cstmrName /*고객명 */ , ( SELECT CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME FROM MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = A.REAL_USE_CUST_NO ) AS realUseCustNm /*실사용고객 */ , A.CUSTOMER_ADR AS customerAdr /*고객주소 */ , FN_GET_ORGNM(A.OPEN_AGNT_CD) || '/' || A.OPEN_AGNT_CD AS agentNm /*개통대리점 */ , DECODE(A.SHOP_CD, NULL, NVL(A.SHOP_NM, '-'), FN_GET_ORGNM(A.SHOP_CD) || '/' || A.SHOP_CD) AS shopNm /*판매점 */ , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(A.SIM_INFO, 36, 1) IN ('A', 'R') THEN FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0058', SUBSTR(A.SIM_INFO, 1, 2)) ELSE FN_GET_CODENM ('CMN0058', SUBSTR(A.INST_INFO, 1, 2)) END AS sprtTpNm /*할인유형 */ , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(A.SIM_INFO, 36, 1) IN ('A', 'R') THEN SUBSTR(A.SIM_INFO, 1, 2) ELSE SUBSTR(A.INST_INFO, 1, 2) END AS sprtTp , TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(A.SIM_INFO, 3, 3)) AS simEnggMnthCnt , TRIM(SUBSTR(A.SIM_INFO, 6, 14)) AS simId /*심플할인ID*/ , SUBSTR(A.SIM_INFO, 20, 8) AS simStartDt /*약정시작일*/ , SUBSTR(A.SIM_INFO, 28, 8) AS simEndDt /*약정종료일*/
, FN_GET_CODENM('MSP0010', SUBSTR(A.SIM_INFO, 36, 1)) AS simStatNm /*할인유형코드 */ , A.TRNS_YN AS trnsYn /* 이관여부 */ , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_CAN WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM) AS canChk /*해지이관체크 */
, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM EMV_SCAN_FILE@DL_MCP WHERE SCAN_ID = A.SCAN_ID) AS scanFileCnt /*서식지파일갯수 */ FROM TT A

/* OpenMgmtMapper.getSubInfoHist */
SELECT A.EVNT_CHANGE_DATE AS evntChangeDate /*변경일시 */ , A.EVNT_TRTM_NO AS evntTrtmNo , A.EVNT_CD AS evntCd , FN_GET_CODENM('MSP0005', A.EVNT_CD) AS evntNm /*변경작업 */
, NVL(A.SUB_LINK_NAME, (SELECT SUB_LINK_NAME FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST WHERE 1=1 AND (EVNT_CHANGE_DATE <= A.EVNT_CHANGE_DATE AND EVNT_CHANGE_DATE >= (SELECT MAX(EVNT_CHANGE_DATE) FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST WHERE 1=1 AND CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND SUB_LINK_NAME IS NOT NULL AND EVNT_CHANGE_DATE <= A.EVNT_CHANGE_DATE)) AND CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND SUB_LINK_NAME IS NOT NULL AND ROWNUM = 1 )) AS subLinkName /*가입자명 */
, A.SUB_STATUS AS subStatus , FN_GET_CODENM('MSP0003', A.SUB_STATUS) AS subStatusNm /*가입자상태*/ , A.SVC_CNTR_NO AS svcCntrNo /*서비스계약번호*/ , C.SOC AS soc , ( SELECT DISTINCT RATE_NM FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE RATE_CD = C.SOC) AS socNm /*요금제 */ , FN_GET_ORGNM(NVL(A.OPEN_AGNT_CD, (SELECT OPEN_AGNT_CD FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM))) AS orgnNm /*대리점 */ FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST A , MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO C WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{CONTRACT_NUM} AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND A.EVNT_TRTM_NO = C.EVNT_TRTM_NO(+) AND C.SERVICE_TYPE(+) = 'P' ORDER BY A.EVNT_CHANGE_DATE DESC

/** OpenMgmtMapper.getModelHist */
SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM AS contractNum , A.MODEL_TYPE AS modelType , A.EVNT_STR AS evntStr /*변경일시 */ , A.EVNT_CD AS evntCd , CASE WHEN A.EVNT_CD = 'C07' AND E.MODEL_CHN_CD NOT IN ('32', '39', '45') THEN FN_GET_CODENM('RCP0020', E.MODEL_CHN_CD) ELSE FN_GET_CODENM('MSP0005', A.EVNT_CD) END AS evntNm /*변경작업 */ , A.MODEL_ID AS modelId , A.MODEL_NM AS modelName /*모델명 */ , A.INTM_SRL_NO AS intmSrlNo /*단말일련번호 */ , B.ICC_ID AS iccId /*USIM카드일련번호*/ , DECODE(A.INTM_SRL_NO, C.PRDT_SRL_NUM, B.WIFI_MAC_ID, '') AS wifiMacId /*WIFI_MAC-ID */ FROM MSP_JUO_MODEL_INFO A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B , LGS_PRDT_SRL_MST C , CMN_INTM_MDL D , MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO E WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{CONTRACT_NUM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.MODEL_ID = C.RPRS_PRDT_ID(+) AND A.INTM_SRL_NO = C.PRDT_SRL_NUM(+) AND A.MODEL_TYPE = 'D1' AND A.MODEL_ID = D.RPRS_PRDT_ID(+) AND D.RPRS_YN(+) = 'Y' AND D.PRDT_TYPE_CD(+) = '01' AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = E.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND A.EVNT_TRTM_NO = E.EVNT_TRTM_NO(+) ORDER BY A.EVNT_STR DESC, A.MODEL_TYPE

/* OpenMgmtMapper.getFeatureHist */
SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM AS contractNum , A.EVNT_TRTM_NO AS evntTrtmNo , A.EVNT_TRTM_DT AS evntTrtmDt /*변경일시*/ , A.SOC AS socCode , NVL(B.RATE_NM, A.SOC) AS socNm /*상품명*/ , A.FEATURE_CODE AS featureCode , A.SERVICE_TYPE AS serviceType , C.CD_DSC AS serviceTypeNm /*상품유형*/ , A.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS effectiveDate /*시작일시*/ , A.EXPIRATION_DATE AS expirationDate /*종료일시*/ , CASE WHEN A.APP_END_DATE >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') THEN '사용' ELSE '만료' END AS status /*상태 */ FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO A , ( SELECT DISTINCT RATE_CD, RATE_NM FROM MSP_RATE_MST ) B , CMN_GRP_CD_MST C WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{CONTRACT_NUM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.SOC = B.RATE_CD(+) AND A.SERVICE_TYPE = C.CD_VAL AND C.GRP_ID = 'MSP0008' ORDER BY A.EVNT_TRTM_DT DESC, A.SERVICE_TYPE

/** OpenMgmtMapper.getBanHist */
SELECT A.BAN AS ban ,TO_CHAR (TO_DATE (A.EVNT_TRTM_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS evntTrtmDt /*변경일시*/ ,A.CUSTOMER_ID AS customerId ,E.CD_DSC AS blBillingMethod /*납부방법*/ ,F.CD_DSC AS blSpclBanCode /*BAN구분 */ ,C.CD_DSC AS colDelinqStatus /*미납상태*/ ,A.BANK_ACCT_HOLDER_ID AS bankAcctHolderId /*실납부자주민번호*/ ,D.CD_DSC AS MARKET_GUBUN ,SUBSTR(A.BAN_ADR_ZIP,1,3)||'-'||SUBSTR(A.BAN_ADR_ZIP,4,6) AS BAN_ADR_ZIP ,A.BAN_ADR_PRIMARY_LN ,A.BAN_ADR_PRIMARY_LN || A.BAN_ADR_SECONDARY_LN AS addr /*납부자주소*/ ,A.BAN_ADR_SECONDARY_LN AS banAdrSecondaryLn ,A.BAN_LINK_NAME AS banLinkName /*납부자이름*/ ,A.EVNT_CD AS evntCd ,A.EVNT_TRTM_NO AS evntTrtmNo FROM MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO A ,CMN_GRP_CD_MST C ,CMN_GRP_CD_MST D ,CMN_GRP_CD_MST E ,CMN_GRP_CD_MST F WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAN = #{BAN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.COL_DELINQ_STATUS = C.CD_VAL(+) AND C.GRP_ID(+) = 'RCP0004' AND A.MARKET_GUBUN = D.CD_VAL(+) AND D.GRP_ID(+) = 'RCP0005' AND A.BL_BILLING_METHOD = E.CD_VAL(+) AND E.GRP_ID(+) = 'RCP0036' AND A.BL_SPCL_BAN_CODE = F.CD_VAL(+) AND F.GRP_ID(+) = 'RCP0010'

/* OpenMgmtMapper.getInvPymList */
SELECT A.BILL_YM AS billYm /*청구월*/ , FN_GET_SALE_ITMNM(A.BILL_ITEM_CD) AS billItemNm /*청구항목*/ , SUM(DECODE(A.PYMN_CD, 'INV', A.PYMN_AMNT + A.VAT_AMNT, 0)) AS invAmnt /*청구금액*/ , SUM(DECODE(A.PYMN_CD, 'ADJ', A.PYMN_AMNT + A.VAT_AMNT, 'ADJR', ( A.PYMN_AMNT + A.VAT_AMNT ) * -1, 0)) AS adjAmnt /*조정금액*/ , FN_GET_CODENM('CLS0045', MAX(A.PYMN_MTHD_CD)) AS pymnMthdNm /*납부방법*/ , MAX(A.BLPYM_DATE) AS blpymDate /*수납일자*/ , SUM(DECODE(A.PYMN_CD, 'PYM' , A.PYMN_AMNT + A.VAT_AMNT , 'BCK', ( A.PYMN_AMNT + A.VAT_AMNT ) * -1, 'RFN', ( A.PYMN_AMNT + A.VAT_AMNT ) * -1, 'RFNR' , A.PYMN_AMNT + A.VAT_AMNT , 'FNTF', ( A.PYMN_AMNT + A.VAT_AMNT ) * -1, 'FNTT', A.PYMN_AMNT + A.VAT_AMNT, 0)) AS pymAmnt /*수납금액*/ FROM CLS_BILL_PYMN_DATA A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.SVC_CNTR_NO = #{CONTRACT_NUM} GROUP BY A.BILL_YM, A.BILL_ITEM_CD ORDER BY A.BILL_YM DESC, A.BILL_ITEM_CD

/* OpenMgmtMapper.getAgentInfo */ SELECT A.LGL_AGNT_NM AS minorAgentName /* 법정대리인명 */ , B.APP_BLCK_AGRM_YN AS appBlckAgrmYn /* APP설치동의 */ , A.LGL_AGNT_NO AS agentTelNum /* 대리인연락번호 */ , C.APP_INST_YN AS appInstYn /* APP설치확인 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP9003', A.AGNT_REL_DIV_CD) AS agentRelNm /* 대리인관계 */ , FN_GET_USRNM(C.INST_CNFM_ID) AS instCnfmNm /* 설치확인자 */ , TO_CHAR(C.INST_CNFM_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS instCnfmDt /* 설치확인일 */ , B.REQUEST_KEY AS requestKey /* 가입신청_키 */ FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , MSP_REQUEST B , MSP_REQUEST_AGENT C WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{CONTRACT_NUM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.PPPO = 'PO' AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND B.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY(+)

/* OpenMgmtMapper.getAddInfoList */
SELECT A.EVNT_TRTM_DT AS evntTrtmDt /*변경일시*/ , A.EVNT_CD AS evntCd , FN_GET_CODENM('MSP0005', A.EVNT_CD) AS evntNm /*전문유형*/ , CASE WHEN A.SIM_ID IS NOT NULL THEN '심플할인' WHEN A.BL_DC_TYPE IN ('KD', 'PM') THEN FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0058', A.BL_DC_TYPE) ELSE '' END AS sprtTpNm /*할인유형*/ , A.ENGG_MNTH_CNT AS enggMnthCnt /*약정기간*/ , DECODE(UPPER(A.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO), 'NONE', '', A.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO) AS grntInsrMngmNo /*보증보험가입번호*/ , CASE WHEN A.SIM_ID IS NOT NULL THEN FN_GET_CODENM('MSP0010', A.GRNT_INSR_STAT_CD) WHEN A.BL_DC_TYPE IN ( 'KD', 'PM' ) THEN FN_GET_CODENM('MSP0011', A.GRNT_INSR_STAT_CD) ELSE '' END AS statNm /*가입상태*/ , A.SIM_ID AS simId /*SIM ID*/ , SUBSTR(A.SIM_START_DT, 1, 8) AS simStartDt /*시작일자*/ , SUBSTR(A.SIM_END_DT, 1, 8) AS simEndDt /*종료일자*/ FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO A WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{CONTRACT_NUM} AND ( A.BL_DC_TYPE IS NOT NULL OR A.SIM_ID IS NOT NULL ) ORDER BY evntTrtmDt DESC

/* OpenMgmtMapper.getDvcChgList */
SELECT A.APPL_STRT_DTTM AS applStrtDttm /*기변일시*/ , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP0050', C.DVC_CHG_RSN_CD) AS dvcChgTpNm , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP0051', C.DVC_CHG_RSN_DTL_CD) AS dvcChgRsnNm , A.MODEL_NM AS modelNm , A.MODEL_ID AS modelId , A.INTM_SRL_NO AS intmSrlNo , B.MODEL_MONTHLY AS instMnthCnt /*할부개월*/ , B.ENGG_MNTH_CNT AS enggMnthCnt /*약정개월*/ , B.MODEL_PRICE + B.MODEL_PRICE_VAT AS outAmnt /*출고가*/ , B.MODEL_INSTALLMENT AS instAmnt /*할부원금*/ , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0058', D.BL_DC_TYPE) AS sprtTpNm /*할인유형*/ , D.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO AS grntInsrMngmNo /*보증보험번호*/ , FN_GET_CODENM('MSP0011', D.GRNT_INSR_STAT_CD) AS grntInsrStatNm FROM MSP_DVC_CHG_AGNT_HST A , MSP_REQUEST_SALEINFO B , MSP_REQUEST_DVC_CHG C , MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO D , MSP_SALE_PLCY_MST E WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{CONTRACT_NUM} AND A.APPL_END_DTTM = '99991231000000' AND A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY AND B.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = D.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.EVNT_TRTM_NO = D.EVNT_TRTM_NO AND NVL(D.GRNT_INSR_STAT_CD, 'A') = 'A' AND B.MODEL_SALE_POLICY_CODE = E.SALE_PLCY_CD(+)

SELECT /** OpenMgmtMapper.getFile1 */ ATT_ROUT AS attRout /* 파일경로 */ , FILE_NM AS fileNm /* 파일명 */ , FILE_ID AS fileId /* 파일ID */ FROM ORG_FILE_MGMT_MST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY REG_DTTM
mapper.insert: /** OpenMgmtMapper.fileInsertByCust */ INSERT INTO ORG_FILE_MGMT_MST ( REGST_ID /* 등록자ID */ , REG_DTTM /* 등록일시 */ , RVISN_ID /* 수정자ID */ , RVISN_DTTM /* 수정일시 */ , ATT_DTTM /* 첨부일시 */ , FILE_NM /* 파일명 */ , ATT_DSC /* 첨부설명 */ , ATT_ROUT /* 첨부경로 */ , ATT_SCTN /* 업무구분 */ , ORGN_ID /* SEQ */ , FILE_ID /* 파일ID */ , CONTRACT_NUM ) VALUES ( #{regstId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 등록자ID */ , sysdate /* 등록일시 */ , #{rvisnId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 수정자ID */ , SYSDATE /* 수정일시 */ , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') /* 첨부일시 */ , #{fileNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 파일명 */ , #{attDsc, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 첨부설명 */ , #{attRout, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 첨부경로 */ , #{attSctn, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 업무구분 */ , #{fileSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* SEQ */ , #{fileId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 파일ID */ , #{contractNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 파일ID */ )
mapper.select: SELECT CONTRACT_NUM AS contractNum FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_CAN WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{CONTRACT_NUM}/* 계약번호 */
